title: Cells and Stripes - image analysis software
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"mvxmv","text":"Quantitative analysis of photo-manipulated samples using a specific setting of the standard laser-scanning microscope is presented. Enclosed software solution is implementing known parameters of the pattern and allows for a quantitative analysis of various laser-induced phenotypes in live or fixed cells. Two software versions based on the same principle are uploaded here, the first one can be used for DNA damage analysis (positive stripes) and the second one for FRAP (negative stripes). \r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"vfvag","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"yntui","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"njtaj","text":"\r","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"tghz0","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aaqyp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"jh3kz","text":"The software can be downloaded from: \"Cells and Stripes Software\":http://www.nature.com/protocolexchange/system/uploads/4245/original/Cells-and-Stripes-Software.zip?1455189535","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Copy the TIF files you want to analyze into the 'data' folder.

Cells and Stripes: A novel quantitative photo-manipulation technique by Martin Mistrik, Eva Vesela, Tomas Furst, Hana Hanzlikova, Ivo Frydrych, Jan Gursky, Dusana Majera, and Jiri Bartek published in Scientific Reports on 11 Feb, 2016 https://dx.doi.org/10.1038/srep19567
